description: Binary assertions for Robinson's Remedies blog post quality

tests.prompt: Write a blog post: '5 Best Lip Balms for Trumpet Players in 2026'
assertions: Output does NOT contain em dashes
Word count is between 750 and 1250
Uses listicle format with numbered items
Robinson's Remedies product is listed as #1 or featured prominently
Includes honest pros AND cons for each product (not just praise for RR)
Contains at least 2 H2 headings
Does NOT fabricate statistics (no 'studies show' without a source)
Includes 'Available on Amazon Prime' or similar CTA

tests.prompt: Write a blog post comparing cold sore treatments: Abreva vs Robinson's Remedies Lightning Stick
assertions: Output does NOT contain em dashes
Word count is between 750 and 1250
Mentions specific ingredients for BOTH products (not just RR)
Does NOT make unsupported medical claims
Uses listicle or structured comparison format (not a direct attack ad)
Includes a FAQ section or addresses common questions
Contains at least one internal link suggestion or CTA
First paragraph answers the main question directly (answer-first format)

tests.prompt: Write a blog post: 'How to Take Care of Your Embouchure: A Complete Guide'
assertions: Output does NOT contain em dashes
Word count is between 750 and 1250
Uses musician-specific language naturally (chops, embouchure, mouthpiece)
References specific muscles (orbicularis oris, buccinator)
Does NOT read like a product ad for the first 300 words
Contains actionable tips, not just product promotion
H2 and H3 headings follow a logical hierarchy
Includes Robinson's Remedies products as recommendations (not the entire focus)
